title: Komal Nahta - Aur Ek Kahani
subTitle: Komal Nahta, the host and a renowned film critic, invites the famous personalities of Indian cinema and discusses issues regarding their personal lives and their journey in the industry.

title: Hum Hain Rahi Pyar Ke
subTitle: Rahul looks after his spoilt nephews, Sunny and Vicky, and niece, Munni. When they go to a funfair, they meet Vyjayanti, who has run away from home, and decide to shelter her without Rahul's consent.

title: Music Café
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most melodious and popular songs are played back-to-back in order to entertain the viewers.

title: Bhakti Geet
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of hymns and devotional songs sung and composed by various talented musicians is played consecutively.

title: Dham Yatra
subTitle: A religious leader sheds light on the mythological significance of a pilgrimage to the sacred destinations of the followers of Hinduism.

subTitle: The host, RJ Anmol, converses with renowned celebrities from Bollywood about their personal lives, career in cinema and a variety of other topics.

title: Kyunki Tum Hi Ho
subTitle: Kavya, a young woman, loves her childhood friend Ayushmaan. However, her life turns upside down when Karan, a wealthy man, enters the frame.

title: Raazz Mahal
subTitle: The peaceful reign of a king and a queen ends when they die under the curse of the 'dakini' Chandralekha. Years later, a prince and a woman, blessed by a goddess, join forces to defeat the evil Chandralekha.
